summary: Tested 5 NEW gamification features: Happy Hour, Beginner Protection, Bidding Streak, Enhanced Achievements, and Telegram Bot. All backend APIs working correctly (15/15 tests passed). Frontend components properly integrated except TelegramConnect which exists but is not added to any page yet.

integration_issues.issue: Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/TelegramConnect.js but is not imported/used in any page (Profile, Notifications, etc.)

happy_hour_api.GET /api/gamification/happy-hour: PASS - Returns config (18-20 Uhr, 2x multiplier) and status
happy_hour_api.status_when_inactive: PASS - Shows starts_in_seconds correctly (2h 38m until 18:00 Berlin)
happy_hour_api.banner_visibility: PASS - Banner not shown when >2 hours away (correct behavior)

beginner_status_api.GET /api/gamification/beginner-status: PASS - Returns is_beginner=true for test user (0 wins)
beginner_status_api.GET /api/gamification/auctions/beginner: PASS - Returns empty list (no beginner auctions created)

achievements_api.GET /api/gamification/achievements: PASS - Returns 15 achievements with progress (0/15 earned)
achievements_api.POST /api/gamification/achievements/chec: PASS - Checks and grants new achievements

streak_api.invalid_auction: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid auction ID

telegram_api.GET /api/telegram/link-code: PASS - Generates 8-char alphanumeric code, expires in 600s
telegram_api.GET /api/telegram/status: PASS - Returns linked=false for test user

frontend_components.Navigation Glücksrad: PASS - data-testid='nav-wheel' visible when logged in
frontend_components.BeginnerAuctions page: PASS - Shows eligibility status, criteria, and empty state
frontend_components.Achievements page: PASS - Shows 12 achievements with categories and rewards

action_items: Add TelegramConnect component to Profile.js or create a dedicated Notifications settings page
critical_code_review_comments: gamification.py: Well-structured with Happy Hour (18-20 Berlin), Streak rewards (5/10/15/25/50), and 15 achievements
telegram.py: Complete implementation with link codes, status, preferences, and message sending (MOCKED without TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN)
HappyHourBanner.js: Shows teaser only within 2 hours of start time (correct UX)
BeginnerAuctions.js: Clean UI with eligibility check and criteria display
Achievements page: Beautiful UI with 12 achievements, categories, and bid rewards

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All components working, TelegramConnect not integrated

mocked_apis_list: Telegram Bot message sending - send_telegram_message() returns False without TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN

context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 gamification features tested: Happy Hour (18-20 Berlin, 2x bids), Beginner Protection (< 10 wins or < 7 days), Streak Bonuses (5/10/15/25/50 milestones), Enhanced Achievements (15 total with bid rewards), Telegram Bot (link codes work, message sending MOCKED). Test user kunde@bidblitz.de has 0 wins so is_beginner=true. TelegramConnect component exists but needs to be added to a page.
